title: Suns end Warriors' season, await No. 1 Thunder
content: The Suns knocked out the Warriors 111-96 on Friday night to secure the No. 8 seed and will face the top-seeded Thunder in the first round of the playoffs.

title: Kerr on future: These jobs have 'expiration dates'
content: Steve Kerr acknowledged his future with the Warriors was uncertain following Friday's season-ending loss to the Suns, saying, "When the run ends, sometimes it's time for new blood and new ideas."

title: Magic, driven by 'urgency,' rip Hornets to advance
content: The Orlando Magic built a 35-point lead in the first half of their 121-90 rout of the Charlotte Hornets in a play-in tournament game Friday night and advanced to a first-round playoff matchup against the Detroit Pistons.

title: Source: Texans, Anderson agree to $150M deal
content: Texans and All-Pro defensive end Will Anderson Jr. have agreed to a historic three-year, $150 million extension to make him the highest-paid non-quarterback, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Fever's Boston lands record $6.3M extension
content: Three-time WNBA All-Star Aliyah Boston has agreed to a four-year, $6.3 million contract extension with the Indiana Fever, her agent told ESPN.

title: Wesley sparks USWNT to 3-0 victory over Japan
content: Kennedy Wesley recorded her first international goal to lead the United States to a 3-0 friendly win over Japan on Friday night in Commerce City, Colorado.

title: Rockets list KD (knee) as questionable for Game 1
content: Kevin Durant sustained a right knee contusion during practice this week, but the Rockets are optimistic it will not be a significant issue during their first-round playoff series against the Lakers, a source told ESPN.

title: Retired stars Bird, Rapinoe announce separation
content: Retired sports stars Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe announced Friday on social media that, after a decade together, they are no longer in a relationship.

title: 🏈 NFL mini mock draft: Predicting top 10 picks
content: We asked NFL scouts to make draft picks for other teams, assigning one to each top-10 slot. Which prospects could go early?

title: WrestleMania 42 roundtable: Most anticipated matches, bold predictions
content: Before we get to a weekend full of wrestling (Saturday and Sunday on ESPN Unlimited), our crew shares its thoughts on the must-see matches and more.

title: Latest draft buzz: Downs' range, Day 2 steals, DT class, more
content: When could Caleb Downs and Jordyn Tyson be drafted? What are the Eagles, Giants and Steelers thinking?

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Who's winning the Stanley Cup? All the intel you need on the 16 playoff teams
content: The postseason Thunderdome is about to open its gate (Saturday on ESPN). Which team will emerge as the 2026 Stanley Cup champion?

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

content: Which award battles are too close to call? Tim Bontemps unveils his official ballot for MVP, All-NBA, Sixth Man and every major honor.

title: Offseason guides: Draft, free agency, trade targets for eliminated teams
content: Summer is here for franchises that missed the playoffs. What lies ahead for the Hornets, Clippers and more?

title: Weekend predictions: Can Arsenal hold off Man City? Will Atlético win Copa del Rey?
content: We've got potential title deciders in England and Germany, a grudge match in Portugal, and the Copa del Rey final: Julien Laurens previews the weekend and makes his predictions.

title: Man City vs. Arsenal: What to watch for in Premier League title showdown
content: Arsenal's visit to Man City on Sunday will likely decide who wins the league. Here are the keys to the match.

title: Forget the 40: The true measure of Carnell Tate
content: Wide receiver Carnell Tate is confident, intelligent and ready to star in the NFL. His mother made sure of it.

title: Spring football games: Previewing Virginia Tech, Michigan, Miami and others
content: Spring football games are in full swing this weekend. Here's what to know ahead of Friday and Saturday.

title: USMNT needs ambitious post-World Cup succession plan
content: Mauricio Pochettino won't coach the USMNT forever, and when he does leave, will U.S. Soccer be able to bring in another big-name boss to replace him?

title: Updated 2026 MLB draft rankings: Top 85 prospects and a 13-pick mock draft
content: The top of the 2026 MLB draft is coming into focus. Here's who your team could be targeting this summer.

title: 2026 NCAA gymnastics championships: Four teams advance out of semifinals
content: Florida, LSU, Oklahoma and Minnesota each advanced to Saturday's NCAA gymnastics final after a roller-coaster day of semifinals Thursday.

title: 'Friday' meets 'Thursday': Rams drop draft teaser inspired by Ice Cube's 1995 film
content: The short film inspired by the 1995 comedy "Friday" stars the sons of Ice Cube and Chris Tucker, joined by Rams players and celebrity cameos.

title: Biggest haters funeral: Chris Paul pokes fun at Clippers after play-in tournament loss
content: The LA Clippers saw their season end Wednesday, and an ex-Clipper made sure to rub salt in the wound.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Mason Miller tops all pitchers? CJ Abrams goes 30-100-30? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Wharton amid Man United, Real Madrid interest
content: Liverpool face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Gen Z is shaking up IndyCar's Millennial, Gen X established order
content: Experience is invaluable in IndyCar, but with Gen Z drivers first through fourth in the standings, the series is witnessing a changing of the guard.

title: 'Shouldn't be considered failure of govt ...': Rijiju on women's reservation bill not clearing LS
content: The government faced a setback as the women's reservation bill failed to pass in the Lok Sabha, requiring a two-thirds majority. Union Minister Kiren Rijiju blamed the Congress and opposition parties, calling it an anti-women stance and a significant blow to the nation. The opposition, while supporting reservation, opposed its linkage with delimitation and census.

title: PSL turns comedy show: Replacement player plays alongside player he replaced
content: A bizarre selection mix-up in the Pakistan Super League saw a replacement player feature alongside the one he was meant to replace. Quetta Gladiators mistakenly included both Dinesh Chandimal and Bevon Jacobs in their Playing XI due to a late illness to Tom Curran, causing social media outrage.

title: DA hike: Govt approves 2% dearness allowance raise for central govt employees
content: Central government employees will see a 2% Dearness Allowance increase, approved by the Cabinet. This comes as employee bodies push for significant pay structure reforms under the proposed 8th Pay Commission, seeking a higher fitment factor and expanded family definitions for pay calculations.

title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
content: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

title: 'Black day for Centre, they felt a shock for first time': Priyanka on delimitation bill defeat
content: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra hailed the defeat of the Delimitation Bill as a victory for democracy, accusing the Centre of a conspiracy to alter the federal structure. The bill, which proposed women's reservation linked to delimitation, failed to secure the required majority in the Lok Sabha. Opposition parties, while supporting women's reservation in principle, opposed its linkage with delimitation and census.

title: Not CSK or MI, RCB to become first ever IPL team to achieve rare milestone
content: The match at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium will be an afternoon game on the day the tournament completes 19 years.

title: NHAI has new guidelines for all FASTag issuer banks to undertake
content: The National Highway Authority of India (NHAI) has ordered all FASTag issuer banks to validate vehicle registration numbers and blacklist those with incorrect details. This directive aims to enhance the accuracy of India's electronic toll collection system, addressing discrepancies that could lead to revenue evasion and enforcement issues, particularly with older FASTags.

title: PSL drama! Afridi loses temper, smashes bat in outburst - Watch
content: Lahore Qalandars captain Shaheen Shah Afridi displayed visible anger after being dismissed for a duck against Quetta Gladiators in the PSL 2026. His frustration, shown by slamming his bat, highlights the defending champions' inconsistent campaign and mounting pressure as they fight for playoff contention.

title: As JP Morgan tests Anthropic’s AI tool Mythos, CEO Jamie Dimon admits 'threat'
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon revealed that AI, while promising long-term security, is currently exacerbating cybersecurity threats. The bank is testing Anthropic's AI model, Mythos, which has already identified thousands of software vulnerabilities. This development has also raised alarms with the US Treasury, highlighting the dual nature of AI in both exposing and potentially exploiting weaknesses.

title: TCS Nashik case: No complaints through POSH channels, absconding female employee; what we know
content: A fact-finding committee has launched an inquiry into alleged sexual harassment and religious conversion at a Nashik TCS office. The panel, including a retired judge and IPS officer, will interview all stakeholders. Meanwhile, Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis called it a "very serious matter," investigating potential "corporate jihad." Police are searching for an accused employee.

title: Ali Asgar on drag typecasting: Comic says kids were bullied over ‘Dadi’
content: Iconic actor Ali Asgar, best known for his beloved 'Dadi' character, opened up about the emotional impact his drag performances had on his family. He shared that his children endured bullying at school because of his female roles, prompting him to turn down similar opportunities.

title: Shubman Gill dethrones Virat Kohli, takes big lead
content: Shubman Gill has taken the lead in the IPL 2026 Orange Cap race with 251 runs after a match-winning 86. Virat Kohli follows closely in second with 228 runs, while Heinrich Klaasen, Rajat Patidar, and Ishan Kishan round out the top five in a tightly contested batting battle.

title: ‘Ashok Kharat may be killed in encounter’: A warning before ‘astrologer’s’ aide dies in car crash
content: Close associate of jailed godman Ashok Kharat and his wife were killed in a road accident on the Samruddhi Expressway. Their 14-year-old son was seriously injured. The fatal crash has sparked suspicion from opposition leaders, though police are treating it as an accident.

title: What is so special about Iran’s uranium that US, China & Russia all want it?
content: Iran's enriched uranium stockpile has become a focal point in a global power contest, with the US, China, and Russia vying for influence. Tehran insists the material will not be handed over, despite US claims of an impending agreement for its recovery. This dispute highlights the complex political and strategic stakes surrounding Iran's nuclear program.

title: American Express executive found dead in Gurgaon; wife finds body inside flat
content: A 33-year-old American Express executive was found dead by suicide in his Gurgaon flat on Friday. His wife, who flew in from Mumbai after he stopped answering calls following a fight, discovered the scene. The couple, married four months ago, faced marital strain due to their differing work locations. Police are investigating the incident, noting the deceased was under stress.

title: Starlink’s India rollout faces FDI, security clearance roadblock: Report
content: Starlink's satellite internet rollout in India faces regulatory hurdles due to national security concerns. The government is cautiously reviewing its foreign direct investment proposal, with potential rejection if queries on cross-holding and network control are not addressed. Security clearance is pending, emphasizing the need to prevent potential misuse.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' opens to strong Rs 23 crore worldwide debut; ends 'Dhurandhar 2' reign
content: Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla' has stormed the box office, securing a massive Rs 23.90 crore worldwide debut on its opening day. This impressive performance has dethroned Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' after its four-week reign. The horror-comedy's strong opening positions it among Akshay Kumar's top post-pandemic releases.

title: JAC class 12 results likely soon as Jharkhand Board enters final evaluation phase
content: Jharkhand Academic Council is poised to unveil the Class 12 results for 2026 imminently, with the evaluation process nearing its end. Students can anticipate checking their scores online by late April or early May. This follows the recent declaration of Class 9 results, indicating a swift conclusion to the board's assessment cycle.

title: ‘Relative took her to Nashik’: SIT forms 3 teams to trace absconding TCS employee
content: Nashik police are searching for a 26-year-old TCS employee accused of religious harassment at work. Her husband, detained in Mumbra, stated a relative took her to Nashik. The woman, now a co-accused in multiple cases, plans to seek anticipatory bail citing pregnancy. The SIT has deployed teams to locate her.

title: 'I woke up ... ': LizLaz breaks silence after Virat Kohli 'likes' then unlikes her pic
content: Cricket star Virat Kohli's recent 'like' on German model LizLaz's photo has gone viral, sparking social media buzz. Laz, surprised by the attention, expressed gratitude and admitted to being an RCB fan. This incident echoes a similar past event involving another influencer, prompting Kohli to issue a clarification about algorithmic errors.

title: ‘Trust Trump, not panicans’: Donald pushes ‘peace president’ image after 'reopening' Hormuz
content: Donald Trump declared himself "The Peace President," claiming to have settled eight wars while simultaneously issuing stern warnings of military action against Iran if ongoing negotiations fail. He highlighted potential progress in West Asia, including a reported ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, though Iran disputed claims about the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Parliament special session: Both Houses adjourned sine die, Budget session concludes
content: The Budget Session of Parliament concluded sine die after the women's reservation Bill failed to pass in the Lok Sabha, falling short of the required two-thirds majority. The government also deferred the contentious delimitation proposal amid Opposition pushback, ending the session on a politically charged note.

title: US extends sanction waiver on Russian oil again — How will it impact India?
content: The US has extended a sanctions waiver on Russian oil purchases, offering temporary relief for countries importing crude. This move allows for continued procurement of Russian oil, particularly beneficial for India which relies heavily on imports and has increased its intake amid Middle East supply pressures. The waiver provides a crucial window for India to secure energy needs.

title: Iran rejects 'traditional toll' but plans fees to secure Hormuz - what it means
content: Iran is planning to implement new transit fees to regulate ship movement through the Strait of Hormuz, requiring prior coordination with Iranian authorities for passage. While "friendly" vessels will be permitted, "hostile military vessels" from the US and Israel will be denied entry. Iran asserts its sole control over the strait's management and security.

title: Will Dhoni play today against SRH? Latest update on CSK star
content: MS Dhoni will not play today against Sunrisers Hyderabad as he continues to recover from a calf strain. While his rehabilitation is progressing well, CSK is taking a cautious approach. He is expected to return for upcoming matches against Mumbai Indians or Gujarat Titans.

title: Open or closed? Ships still stuck as Trump, Iran engage in war of words over status of Hormuz
content: The Strait of Hormuz's reopening remains uncertain despite Iranian and US claims. While some vessels attempted passage, many turned back, with the International Maritime Organization seeking clarification on safety. The US maintains its naval blockade, while Iran warns of re-closure if the blockade persists, impacting vital global oil and LNG transit.

title: TCS Nashik case: Woman who was referred to as HR manager held no leadership responsibilities
content: TCS clarified that an individual wrongly identified as an HR manager in the Nashik controversy was a process associate with no recruitment involvement. The company denied reports of the unit's shutdown and reiterated its zero-tolerance policy for misconduct, while also stating no internal complaints were received. An independent inquiry, supported by external agencies, is underway.

title: 'Netanyahu was stunned when he saw Trump's post': Did US 'prohibit' Israeli strikes on Lebanon?
content: United States President Donald Trump has declared Israel is prohibited from conducting further airstrikes in Lebanon. This statement surprised Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Meanwhile, Iran announced it is reopening the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping. This move signals potential progress in broader United States-Iran diplomacy. Despite the ceasefire, some military activity was reported.

title: FSSAI orders the use of strip paper test to check illegal ripening of three fruits
content: FSSAI has issued a stern warning against unsafe fruit ripening practices, directing states to strictly enforce regulations against prohibited artificial agents like calcium carbide. The advisory highlights serious health risks associated with these chemicals and mandates intensified market surveillance and legal action against offenders.

title: Will Virat Kohli play as Impact Player again today vs DC?
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru faces Delhi Capitals with a key question surrounding Virat Kohli's role. After an ankle injury, Kohli played as an Impact Player against LSG, scoring 49. While expected to be fit, his workload management could see him reprise the Impact Player role. RCB, in strong form, aims for a top spot.

title: Iran Shuts Hormuz Again, Accuses US Of Violating Deal To Reopen It
content: Iran Reimposes Restrictions On Strait Of Hormuz Amid Middle East War, Accuses US Of Violating Deal To Reopen It

title: 'Opposition Made A Mistake, Will Pay Consequences': PM Modi On Women's Quota Bill Failing Parliament Test
content: Opposition must face the consequences and answer the women, sources have said, quoting PM Modi during a cabinet meeting.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Reverses Decision, Restricts Strait Of Hormuz Again Amid US Blockade
content: US-Iran War Live: The Iran war began when the US and Israel attacked Iran on February 28. Iran responded with its own strikes on Israel and Gulf states that host US bases.

title: 'No One Can Touch Tamil Nadu': Rahul Gandhi As Constitution Amendment Bill Fails
content: The Centre needed a two-thirds majority to get the Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, 2026, passed, but fell short of the mark. The proposed legislation saw 298 MPs voting in its favour and 230 voting against.

title: Johnson vs Johnson: Dramatic Family Battle In $18 Trillion Empire
content: Abigail Johnson, daughter of then-chairman Edward “Ned” Johnson III, had been leading Fidelity’s flagship mutual-funds division.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Toughest Opponent? His Own Economy
content: Average tax refunds are up only about $350, or 11%, over last year, according to the Treasury Department. That's far lower than the original projections of nearly $1,000.

title: Rammed By MLA's Son With Thar, Victims Allege No Help, Seek Treatment Costs
content: Dinesh Lodhi, son of Pichhore MLA Pritam Lodhi, had allegedly rammed three men riding a motorcycle and two women pedestrians earlier this week.

title: Is There A Food Shortage On American Warships Near Iran? What US Said
content: The US Navy said that both ships have adequate food supplies and are providing 'healthy options' to all crew members.

title: Kash Patel Is 'Repeatedly Drunk' In Public, Claims Report, He Says "Fake News"
content: The report mentioned that he has been seen drinking to the point of apparent intoxication at Washington, D.C. venues, often in the presence of administration staff.

title: Pics: Indian Air Force Chief Flies F-15 Fighter Jet During US Visit
content: Indian Air Chief Marshal Amar Preet Singh flew the Boeing F-15EX during his US visit for defence talks.

title: US U-Turn On Russian Oil Waivers Amid Iran War And How It Helps India
content: The so-called US general license replaces the earlier waiver on Russian oil with a similar one, effectively pushing the deadline to May 16.

title: CCTV Inside Kerala Principal Office Shows Moments Before Dalit Student's Death
content: Teachers had earlier stated that Nithin Raj was called to the principal's office after they began receiving repeated calls from the recovery agent, which they described as persistent harassment.

title: Man, Son Stabbed To Death In Delhi, Cops Arrest Neighbour Over Old Dispute
content: Following the incident, the opposition Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) targeted the Delhi Police, alleging deteriorating law and order in the national capital.

title: Parliament Special Session Highlights: Houses Adjourned Sine Die After Constitutional Amendment Fails In Lok Sabha
content: Parliament's 3-day special session Live Updates, Day 1: The government is expected to introduce three amendment Bills aimed at operationalising the legislation, which was passed in 2023 to provide 33% reservation for women in the Lok Sabha and State

title: TCS 'Conversion' Accused Nida Khan's Husband Gave Cops Her Location, They Found It Locked
content: TCS, on Friday, released an official statement on X - clarifying that Nida Khan is neither an HR manager nor has been responsible for recruitment.

title: How Vijay's Young Fans Are Nudging Votes For TVK In Tamil Nadu Polls
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections 2026: Vijay's campaign slogans over the last few months have become a superhit among children.

title: Indian Refiners Settle Iran Oil Deals In Yuan? Centre Says 'Nothing Wrong'
content: The payments for Iranian oil deals are being settled by the ICICI Bank, which is routing funds in Chinese Yuan to settler accounts, Reuters reported.

title: Have to remove Mamata as Bengal CM, else Bangladeshi Muslims will snatch State from us: Himanta
content: "Mamata Banerjee has earmarked the entire treasury of Bengal for Bangladeshi Muslim infiltrators. She sold this land to Bangladeshi Muslims for votes," says Assam CM

title: T.N. Assembly election: AIADMK is just a mask for BJP, says Rahul Gandhi at Ponneri
content: “There is no real AIADMK ... So when you see the AIADMK, its flag, its leaders, remember that they are controlled by Narendra Modi [Prime Minister] and Amit Shah [Union Home Minister] and are being used to attack Tamil history, culture, and language,” Mr. Gandhi said

title: EC assures High Court of action on complaint regarding distribution of ₹10,000 tokens in Harbour constituency
content: An advocate had complained about such tokens having been distributed on behalf of AIADMK candidate Royapuram Mano in Harbour constituency

title: Upload orders, verdicts on the day they are passed: Bombay HC directs judges in Maharashtra, Goa
content: The move is expected to streamline the judicial process and provide litigants with immediate access to court rulings, reducing the lag between the pronouncement and the official availability of legal documents.

title: Amid Nashik probe, TCS says no complaints received through internal channels
content: According to a preliminary probe, the company was not in receipt of any complaints, as being alleged, a statement said

title: Civil Securities case: U.S. SEC, Adanis jointly seek extension; propose revised schedule
content: The SEC had sued Adani Group founder Gautam Adani and his nephew, Sagar, in November 2024, alleging they had misled investors by failing to disclose an alleged bribery scheme tied to Indian state officials

title: Weapons seized in central Kolkata, one detained ahead of West Bengal polls
content: Acting on suspicion, STF sleuths intercepted the man, carrying a bag, near a bus stand and recovered six single-shot firearms and 14 cartridges from him, an official

title: Opposition chose politics over progress, says Suresh Gopi on Constitution Amendment Bill defeat
content: In a post on Facebook, Union Minister says it was ‘not just a Bill, but the aspirations of millions of Indian women that were defeated’

title: High Court order for FIR against Rahul Gandhi in dual citizenship case surprising, unwarranted: Gehlot
content: The Lucknow bench of the Allahabad High Court directed the filing of an FIR against Rahul Gandhi based on a petition filed by a BJP worker claiming the Congress leader is a U.K. citizen

title: BJP, Opposition in war of words after Constitution Amendment Bill defeat
content: While the BJP termed the development a “black day” and accused the Congress and other Opposition parties of betraying women, the Congress and its allies asserted that the quota law, passed in 2023, should be implemented immediately

title: 'Godman' Kharat's close aide, wife die in car crash; Oppn leaders raise suspicion over incident
content: Opposition leaders, meanwhile, dubbed the incident “unbelievable” and wondered if it was “orchestrated” to ensure suppression of facts in the probe against Kharat

title: Mysore University School of Engineering delivers first batch of graduates; AI and quantum computing will shape future workforce, says Sudhanva Dhananjaya of Excelsoft
content: 144 students pass out from the Mysore University School of Engineering (MUSE) at its first graduation day

title: Kerala elections: Kozhikode DCC general secretary Nijesh Aravind quits, cites ‘sidelining’ in party
content: Nijesh Aravind submits resignation to KPCC claiming he was ‘deliberately excluded’ from poll campaign responsibilities

title: How the war on Iran set off worker protests around Delhi
content: Thousands of workers, many migrants, in the industrial clusters of Uttar Pradesh and Haryana are on protest, demanding dignity at work and at least ₹20,000 as minimum wages. A.M. Jigeesh and Ashok Kumar report on how the administration has allegedly resorted to suppression, by taking workers into custody and putting their leaders under house arrest, while announcing marginal pay hikes

title: Owaisi criticises Union govt for ignoring his proposed amendments to Delimitation Bill
content: Mr. Owaisi,  who is the president of the All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul Muslimeen (AIMIM), said his proposals included reserving 27% of seats for OBCs and women belonging to minority communities.

title: 30-year-old dies after being attacked by Indian gaur near Kalasa in Chikkamagaluru
content: This is the third death in an attack by an Indian gaur in Chikkamagaluru district since February 2025

title: Cash incentives for women steer Bengal poll discourse
content: As the Bengal poll campaign has reached its peak, the contest is gathering pace between the Lakshmir Bhandar of the Trinamool Congress and the Matri Shakti Vandan Yojana of the Bharatiya Janata Party

title: Centre's conspiracy to change federal structure defeated; victory of Opposition unity, says Priyanka
content: Congress leader Priyanka Gandhi Vadra demanded that the government implement the Women's Reservation Act of 2023 on the current strength of the Lok Sabha.

title: Rural summer camp ‘Akkareya Angala’ launched for children in Mandya district of Karnataka
content: Mandya zilla panchayat Chief Executive Officer K. R. Nandini said the primary objective of the camp is to encourage reading, writing, creative arts, and special games. The initiative aims to ensure that children from rural areas utilise their summer holidays in an enjoyable and productive manner

title: With PM and HM away, Chief Ministers of BJP-ruled States step up campaign for party in West Bengal
content: Chief Minister of Maharashtra and Assam targeted the Trinamool govt. over decline of industries in the State, while U.P. CM criticised law and order situation in West Bengal

title: TCS case: pregnant Nida Khan to move court for anticipatory bail; police quiz her spouse
content: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis says: “TCS is a very serious incident; we are trying to get to the roots of it”

title: Inside Bengaluru’s upgraded HAL Aerospace Museum
content: The upgraded HAL Heritage Centre and Aerospace Museum has been unveiled following extensive modernisation.

title: Kochi Corporation engineer’s report says Ro-Ro services viable if efficiently managed
content: Mayor had sought a report after councillors across both Opposition and Treasury benches criticised the manner in which the services, currently operated by Kerala Shipping and Inland Navigation Corporation, have been draining Corporation’s resources

title: Mysuru-Belagavi Vishwamanava Express to get LHB coaches for more safety, comfort from April 26
content: The new coach composition will take effect from April 26 for departures from Mysuru, and April 27 from Belagavi

title: Naval Commanders’ Conference concludes, Home Secretary stresses coastal security
content: The apex-level conference, held from April 14 to 17, served as a key platform to review the Navy’s operational and material preparedness, infrastructure, logistics and human resource initiatives

title: Wheelchairs, water pots donated to Mysuru city railway station
content: The wheelchairs will significantly assist elderly and differently-abled passengers, ensuring better accessibility and ease of movement

title: Amravati sexual exploitation case: NCW calls for stricter action, content to be taken down
content: Ms. Rahatkar raised questions about the adequacy of legal provisions invoked and sought clarification on why more stringent sections have not been applied

title: Prakash Karat praises Stalin, INDIA bloc for defeating Constitutional Amendment Bill
content: Terming the Bill the latest attack on the rights of Opposition-ruled States, he says the Modi government is trying to tamper with the federal structure

title: Defeat of Constitution Amendment Bill betrayal of nation's woman power: Adityanath
content: “The Opposition's obstruction of the passage of the Constitutional Amendment Bill, essential for the 'Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam', is a blow to the honour of 'Bharat Mata' [Mother India]. It is a betrayal of the entire woman power of the nation; it is an infringement upon their democratic rights,” says Adityanath

title: India drops proposal to mandate national ID app Aadhaar on smartphones after pushback
content: India’s IT ministry reviewed the ⁠proposal and “is not in favour of mandating the pre-installation of the Aadhaar App on smartphones,” UIDAI said in a statement to Reuters

title: Calcutta High Court sets aside appointment of assistant professors as presiding officers for Bengal polls
content: The counsel for the Election Commission submitted before the court that there are approximately 90,000 booths to conduct the election on April 23 and April 29, and as such, it is not possible for the authorities to prepare the seniority list, and there might be some overlapping

title: Parliament adjourned sine die, Budget session concludes
content: As soon as the House met at 11 a.m., Speaker Om Birla read out his concluding remarks, following which he adjourned the House sine die (for an indefinite period)

title: Parliament special sitting updates: Parliament adjourned sine die as Budget session concludes
content: Priyanka Gandhi challenged govt to bring back old Women's Bill; leader of the Opposition Rahul Gandhi had accused the government of “hiding behind women” to alter the country’s electoral map.

title: Relocation fear returns to haunt Amrabad’s particularly vulnerable Chenchu tribe
content: It is a common practice among Chenchus to establish ‘pentas’  (habitation) wherever they move to in search of food

title: Maximum temperatures in 10 Telangana districts cross 44℃, all districts above 42℃
content: Dasturabad in Nirmal district emerged as the hottest location, recording a maximum temperature of 44.5℃

title: DMK must return to power as they consistently deliver on promises, says Kamal
content: Opposition to Delimitation Bill in Parliament is a fight against forces that tried to stifle the State, says the MNM leader; he says DMK govt. is truthful and honest, and did not play with people’s lives

title: Higher education budget up by 60% in 5 years, yet T.N. govt. universities continue to struggle for funds
content: A State government committee noted in its October 2025 report that the existing model of disbursement of grants has not resulted in excellence in academics or better financial discipline

title: Paigah Palace in Hyderabad’s Begumpet gets a new lease of life
content: The building is being resurrected by the State government by restoring the windows, stucco work, flooring, ceiling and undoing the damage where steel-rods were drilled into the walls to fix bullet-proof doors and windows

title: In Bollywood’s backyard, Marathi cinema finds a fresh voice
content: In a state dominated by big-budget Hindi films and Bollywood stars, Marathi cinema is carving out space with fresher, more rooted stories — increasingly finding younger audiences on OTT platforms. Here’s a guide to discovering them

title: Trekking SOP announced by Karnataka: What you need to know
content: A mobile app with details of trekking route maps will be installed in the phone of every trekker, which will help locate a trekker if they get lost

title: Karnataka High Court upholds cancellation of school’s recognition for producing fake certificate and illegally running madarasa
content: Authorities found that the society was operating schools in different names under one certificate, and crediting fees collected from students to different accounts of an unregistered society besides illegally running a madarasa within the campus

title: Runway repairs completed after IAF aircraft incident at Pune Airport; flight operations resume
content: Union Minister of State for Civil Aviation Murlidhar Mohol added that air traffic in Pune is expected to gradually return to normal over the course of the day

title: Kerala BDS student death: Three InstaPay loan app operators arrested from Noida amid harassment claims
content: Kannur City Cyber Crime police take three into custody from Noida. Police cite sustained harassment linked to loan recovery practices as a key line of investigation

title: Nine people dead as van carrying Malappuram school teachers plunges off Valparai cliff in Tamil Nadu
content: The deceased were part of a 12-member group from Malappuram district; three shifted to hospital in Coimbatore with severe injuries; police say the van they travelled in fell from a hairpin bend

title: Centre updates list of banks authorised to import gold, silver under Foreign Trade Policy
content: According to the notification issued by the DGFT, amendments have been made in Appendix 4B of the Handbook of Procedures, 2023, under the Foreign Trade Policy, 2023

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: How a stool at polling booths makes a huge difference for these people
content: Members of Tamil Nadu Dwarfism Association have reiterated a set a demands they have always made when the hustings is round the corner

title: We know how to bring debt under control, improve finances of Tamil Nadu: Palaniswami
content: On delimitation, the Union Minister for Home Affairs has clarified that not only Tamil Nadu but other States also will not be affected. I have also reiterated it. Tamil Nadu’s share will go up from 7.18% to 7.23%. This has disproved what Mr. Stalin has been saying: Edapaddi K. Palaniswami

title: Nine killed as van carrying Malappuram school teachers plunges off Valparai cliff
content: Most of the passengers in the van were teachers of Government Lower Primary School, Pang, and their family members. The van reportedly fell from hairpin bend number 13 and tumbled down to hairpin bend number 9.

title: Odisha comes up with compensatory irrigation mechanism for acquisition of irrigated land
content: The government clarified that the compensatory irrigation will be created preferably in the same project area where the ayacut is lost by way of extension of a canal system if possible or through pumped irrigation system

title: Heatwave alert in Maharashtra till April 20; Akola hottest at 44.2°C
content: According to IMD, there will be a gradual rise in maximum temperature by 1-2°C over parts of Konkan during the next three days, followed by a fall of 2-3°C thereafter

title: BMRCL managers spend more time in meetings than running Namma Metro in Bengaluru: E&M staff
content: BMRCL’s electrical and mechanical staff submit representation over operational and administrative concerns

title: H5N1 virus detected in Hesaraghatta poultry centre near Bengaluru; no need for panic, says Dinesh Gundu Rao
content: As part of containment efforts, 7,444 birds were culled, and over 14,000 eggs and 2,250 kg of poultry feed were scientifically disposed of on April 15 under the supervision of the Animal Husbandry Department.

title: Fantasy baseball news: Expect Padres bats to stay hot and Friday's news to know
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . fantasy baseball 's Week 4 gets off to an unusually early start, as it begins with the annual Boston Red Sox game, scheduled for an 11:10 a.m. ET first pitch .

title: Lebanese return to ‘unliveable’ areas as ceasefire with Israel mostly holds
content: people uprooted by the war in Lebanon began returning to devastated towns and neighbourhoods . many find their homes destroyed or uninhabitable and hesitant to stay for fear a ceasefire could unravel . the agreement has added to optimism that the parallel war between the us and Iran could be nearing an end .

title: 19 going on 35: How Konnor Griffin's maturity is making an impression on Pirates
content: the 19-year-old Pittsburgh Pirates rookie gave Konnor Griffin a franchise-record contract extension . he struck out on five pitches, three of which were over 100 mph . "now, I've done it," an analyst says .

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Iyana Martin Carrion is selected no. 7 by the Portland Fire in the 2026 WNBA draft . fantasy women's basketball uses a head-to-head points scoring system . the rankings are the foundation of ESPN Fantasy Women's Basketball .

title: Delimitation debate: US model of population vs equality in two Houses
content: the united states has been capped at 435 seats since 1929 . after every decennial census those seats are redistributed among the states according to population . states such as California, Florida and Texas have gained representation .

title: Why bring a bill that would fail? Several theories do rounds over govt's women quota move
content: many in BJP felt PM Modi pushed the bill because it would strengthen the party’s position among women . the bill was, of course, defeated, but it brought out who are in support of women’s quota and who are not .

title: ‘Won’t leave’: Desi student lives alone in 9-storey building in Iran

title: Lapsed fan's guide to the Stanley Cup playoffs: The NHL's second season begins
content: sidney Crosby joins "the Pat McAfee Show" to preview the Penguins playoff matchup . this FAQ is a guide to the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs . a franchise that went 25 years between playoff series wins is now assumed to be in the postseason .
